note: Respects 15 concurrent request limit: Batch 1 (1) → Batch 2 (10) → Batch 3 (15) → Batch 4 (7)

batches.name: Next.js Project Scaffold
batches.rationale: Everything depends on this. Must be merged to main before any style pages are created.

tasks.title: Initialize Next.js 15 project with Tailwind, Framer Motion, and gallery home page

batches.name: First 10 styles (concurrent: 10/15)
batches.rationale: All 10 are independent pages. Run in parallel after Batch 1 merges. Uses 10 of 15 slots.

tasks.title: Academia
tasks.prompt:
Read AGENTS.md, docs/architecture.md, docs/ui-ux-guidelines.md, docs/animation-guide.md, and docs/page-template.tsx. Then read section '## 1. Academia' in designprompts_dev_all_styles.md.

Create app/styles/academia/page.tsx — a full, production-grade landing page implementing the Academia/Classical design system exactly as specified.

Requirements:
- 'use client' at top
- Fonts: Cormorant_Garamond (heading), Crimson_Pro (body), Cinzel (display/labels) via next/font/google
- Design tokens from the spec: background #1C1714, foreground #E8DFD4, accent #C9A962, etc.
- All 10 sections: Navbar, Hero, Stats, Features, ProductDetail, Pricing, Testimonials, FAQ, Newsletter, Footer
- Mandatory signature elements: arch-top images, sepia-to-color transitions, Roman numeral labels, drop caps, corner flourishes, ornate dividers, wax seals, brass elements, engraved text, texture overlays
- Framer Motion scroll-triggered entrances with dignified timing (500-700ms, ease-out)
- Fully responsive, mobile-first, 44px min touch targets
- useReducedMotion() respected

After creating, run: npm run build to verify.
